message:
test(telegram): add schema completeness, metadata validation, and media integration tests

Add comprehensive Telegram connector test coverage:
- Schema completeness verification for all operations
- Introspection metadata validation (capability, risk_level, safety_tier)
- Risk level assertions (read ops are safe/low)
- Determinism checks for introspection and schemas
- Manifest TOML parsing and structural validation
- Integration tests: send_media (photo/document/video/audio), get_file
  download, and answer_callback_query with wiremock

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
